name: Bomin Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Bomin Electronics Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells PCBs in China and internationally. The company primarily offers high density interconnect, general double-sided, multi-layer, microwave high-frequency, heavy copper, metal base/core and flexible, and rigid-flex boards. Its products are used in communication equipment, medical devices, military hi-tech products, test systems, aeronautics and astronautics, household electronic products, automotive products, industrial control electronics, consumer electronics, high frequency microwave electronics, and other fields. Bomin Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Meizhou, China.
